Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1D00 "MUNCHMAN64-5000-1D00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Munch Man 64.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $5000 which sets $034C to $0A so that a protection check at $0980 passes.
